2603.26736.title: Ordinal Semantic Segmentation Applied to Medical and Odontological Images
2603.26736.paper_summary: Semantic segmentation consists of assigning a semantic label to each pixel according to predefined classes. This process facilitates the understanding of object appearance and spatial relationships, playing an important role in the global interpretation of image content. Although modern deep learning approaches achieve high accuracy, they often ignore ordinal relationships among classes, which may encode important domain knowledge for scene interpretation. In this work, loss functions that incorporate ordinal relationships into deep neural networks are investigated to promote greater semantic consistency in semantic segmentation tasks. These loss functions are categorized as unimodal, quasi-unimodal, and spatial. Unimodal losses constrain the predicted probability distribution according to the class ordering, while quasi-unimodal losses relax this constraint by allowing small variations while preserving ordinal coherence. Spatial losses penalize semantic inconsistencies between neighboring pixels, encouraging smoother transitions in the image space. In particular, this study adapts loss functions originally proposed for ordinal classification to ordinal semantic segmentation. Among them, the Expanded Mean Squared Error (EXP_MSE), the Quasi-Unimodal Loss (QUL), and the spatial Contact Surface Loss using Signal Distance Function (CSSDF) are investigated. These approaches have shown promising results in medical imaging, improving robustness, generalization, and anatomical consistency.
2603.26736.paper_summary_zh: 語義分割是根據預定義的類別為每個像素分配語義標籤。<lb/>這個過程有助於理解物體的外觀和空間關係，在圖像內容的全球解釋中扮演著重要角色。<lb/>儘管現代深度學習方法達到了高準確率，但它們通常忽略了類別之間的序數關係，而這些關係可能編碼了場景解釋的重要領域知識。<lb/>在這項工作中，研究了將序數關係納入深度神經網絡的損失函數，以促進語義分割任務中的更大語義一致性。<lb/>這些損失函數被分類為單峰、準單峰和空間損失。<lb/>單峰損失根據類別排序約束預測的概率分佈，而準單峰損失則通過允許小的變化來放寬這一約束，同時保持序數一致性。<lb/>空間損失對相鄰像素之間的語義不一致進行懲罰，促進圖像空間中的平滑過渡。<lb/>特別是，本研究將最初為序數分類提出的損失函數調整為序數語義分割。<lb/>其中，擴展均方誤差（EXP_MSE）、準單峰損失（QUL）和使用信號距離函數的空間接觸表面損失（CSSDF）被研究。<lb/>這些方法在醫學影像中顯示出良好的結果，提高了穩健性、泛化能力和解剖一致性。
2603.26736.author: Mariana Dória Prata Lima et.al.
2603.26736.authors: Mariana Dória Prata Lima, Gilson Antonio Giraldi, Jaime S. Cardoso
